title: podocarpus deflexus
intro: Podocarpus deflexus, also known as the yellow tree fern, is a plant species that belongs to the family Podocarpaceae and is native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Podocarpus deflexus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as an antiseptic agent, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as tea, tincture, and ointment, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
